caption:
Some looks don't ask for permission — they simply arrive, bold and full of colour.

June on the islands has this particular energy: the air is warm, the evenings are long, and everything feels a little more alive. A printed scarf tied just so, a woven bag full of possibilities, cobalt trousers that match the sea on a clear afternoon — this is the uniform of a summer that has finally, properly, begun.

Scarf: @epiceparis
Bag: @epiceparis
